message:
feat(vdbe,mvcc,btree,wal): time-travel version store, btree balance fixes, WAL FEC improvements

Wire set_version_store into VdbeEngine for MVCC time-travel page
resolution. Includes btree balance safety improvements and WAL FEC
repair enhancements from concurrent agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
